themes.notes: 1.2.7 动画特色：人物以主题动作循环，不整体漂浮、不加背后扫光；复活岛石像抬头低头，黑洞高光沿事件视界环绕，完整车辆带轻微引擎振动和速度线，Zen 冥想呼吸并扩散涟漪。模型档位拉条同步主题色。Animation highlights: grounded character actions without sweeping backlight, Moai head movement, orbiting black-hole light, a complete car with restrained engine motion, Zen breathing ripples, and theme-aware model sliders.
